MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admission To Plaintiff As Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BERNAL HEIGHTS HOUSING CORPORATION's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission To Plaintiff As Admitted.

Defendant Bernal Heights Housing Corp.'s ("Bernal Heights") Motion to Deem Requests for Admission to Plaintiff as Admitted is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. Bernal Heights' request for monetary sanctions as against Plaintiff Sandra Thomas ("Thomas") is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED in the amount of $1230.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-18-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
